description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: test-msvc-cppwinrt-build, test-msvc-cppwinrt-test, build-msvc-natvis, build-msvc-nuget-test, and build-nuget. Each job runs on a windows-latest environment and performs various tasks such as building, testing, and packaging a C++ project using MSVC and NuGet.
